title: cyperus aromaticus var. elatus
intro: Cyperus aromaticus var. elatus, also known as umbrella sedge or papyrus sedge, is a plant species belonging to the sedge family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Ayurvedic medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Cyperus aromaticus var. elatus include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
